## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Privacy Review

- [ ] No sudo prompt was added.
- [ ] No destructive command was added.
- [ ] No telemetry or network upload was added.
- [ ] New exported fields are redacted or documented.
- [ ] Fixtures and screenshots use fake data only.

## Validation

- [ ] `swift build`
- [ ] `swift test`
- [ ] Manual app run, if UI changed
